exp30 2-phase HN mining: dense MAP@100=0.236 (up from 0.180), hybrid+rerank MAP@100=0.3149 new best
exp30 hard neg mining + RRF fusion (no rerank): MAP@100=0.3275 NEW BEST, milestone 3 achieved
exp30 +Qwen3-Reranker top-100: WORSE than RRF alone (reranker degrades good fusion)
exp31 grad accum (eff batch=512) + cosine LR: worse than exp30 baseline
exp32 ColBERT MaxSim re-score: MaxSim worse than mean-pooled, fused MAP@100=0.304 below exp30
ColBERT late interaction (128d token embs, MaxSim rescore top-200) + 2-phase HN mining + BM25 RRF. ColBERT MaxSim=0.2079 worse than mean-pooled=0.2330. Fused=0.3038 < exp30=0.3275
3-phase iterative HN mining (200s*3) + BM25 RRF, dense MAP@100=0.3152
exp33 3-phase iterative HN mining + RRF: MAP@100=0.3483 MAP@1000=0.4147 NEW BEST
exp35 BM25+Bo1 + 5 paraphrase variants (Qwen3.5-4B) + RRF: MAP@100=0.2754 (above BM25 0.2504 but below best 0.3483)
exp35-simple: BM25+Bo1 + all variant strategies (vLLM thinking) + RRF: MAP@100=0.2441 WORSE than BM25 baseline. Thinking model generated ~15 variants/topic (expected 5), diluting RRF.
query-variants(Qwen3.5-4B) + BM25+Bo1 + RRF: all strategies hurt MAP@100 vs baseline 0.2504
exp34: 3-phase HN + multi-variant RRF (2220 variants): MAP@100=0.3285 WORSE than baseline 0.3450 (no variants). Variants dilute RRF.
BM25+Bo1 + query variants (para+q2d+decomp) RRF >> Qwen3-Reranker top-100: MAP@100=0.2667, variants+rerank > variants-only (0.2635) > rerank-only (0.2537) > baseline (0.2504)

exp37: Diversity analysis of 40 retrieval systems. Top-5 portfolio for relevant docs: exp33-iter-hn(82.5%), +exp35-paraphrase(+5.3%), +exp30-HN-dense(+3.8%), +exp36-fused(+1.2%), +exp34-dense(+0.8%) = 93.6% coverage. New systems: QL/DPH/PL2/TF-IDF/BM25-noPRF.
exp38: bge-base-en-v1.5 3-phase HN mining + RRF: MAP@100=0.3348 (below e5-base 0.3483). Dense=0.2925 (vs 0.3152). OVERFIT/PLATEAU signal. e5-base-v2 remains better backbone.
exp39: linear interp(alpha=0.6) dense+BM25: MAP@100=0.3651 > RRF(0.3483) NEW BEST. nDCG@10=0.6575
exp40: title boost (3x) + 3-phase HN + linear interp(alpha=0.6): MAP@100=0.3573 < baseline 0.3651. Dense=0.3071 < 0.3152. Title repetition wastes token budget.
exp41: Listwise LLM reranking (Qwen3-4B) on exp39 fused top-100, sliding window 20/10, MAP@100 drops 0.3651->0.3602
